# paddingStyle

**Instance Property**

Defines what kind of padding graph applies to the operation.

## Declaration

```swift
var paddingStyle: MPSGraphPaddingStyle { get set }
```

## Discussion

Default value: `MPSGraphPaddingStyleExplicit`.
